_description: All statistical processing performed for this match — scipy computations, lambda fits, Skellam distributions, thinned Poisson, time-window scaling

lambda_fits_via_brentq.description: For each market P(X > k) = p, solve lambda via: brentq(lambda l: 1 - poisson.cdf(k, l) - p, 0.001, 100)

lambda_total_shots.convergence_note: Initial least_squares(x0=2.0) failed — converged to goals lambda (1.97) not shots lambda. Fixed by switching to brentq with explicit bounds (0.001, 100).

skellam_computation.description: P(A > B) = 1 - skellam.cdf(0, lambda_A, lambda_B), where Skellam(k; mu1, mu2) models the difference of two independent Poisson random variables

Q6_mex_6plus_SOT.note: Strong NO signal — Mexico never hit 6 SOT in any WC2026 match

Q1_Jimenez.note: Based on Jimenez as primary striker with ~33% goal share. n=2 starts, small sample.
Q1_Jimenez.rule5_trimming: Trimmed from 0.318 to 0.27 (RULE5: small sample n=2; RULE12: removing RSA result changes estimate materially)

Q5_Plata.rule5_trimming: Trimmed from 0.321 to 0.28 (RULE5: small sample; card-risk may lead to early sub)

Q13_goal_before_first_hydration_break.category: TIMING_EARLY — reliable category (3/3 wins in prior knockout matches)
Q13_goal_before_first_hydration_break.note: Used raw near-estimate, no late-window discount applied

Q7_goal_outside_box.base_rate: ~8-12% of goals in knockout matches are from outside the box
Q7_goal_outside_box.confidence: LOW — no market, no ESPN precedent in our files

Q8_own_goal.base_rate: WC2022: 6 OGs in 64 matches = 9.4% match rate
Q8_own_goal.adjustment: Trimmed slightly given Mexico's clean defensive record and expected tight match

Q12_3plus_offsides.rule8_context_shade: Shaded to 0.28 (tight match = fewer forward runs = fewer offsides)
Q12_3plus_offsides.ECU_low_offside_note: Ecuador: 0 offsides vs CIV, 1 vs CUR, 1 vs GER. Rarely caught offside even in high-attacking output games.
Q12_3plus_offsides.post_match_note: LARGEST SINGLE WIN: +49.58 RBP. Crowd massively overpriced offsides. Our ESPN data correctly identified Ecuador's structural low-offside profile.
